messages.content: A tranquil alpine meadow terrain with a crystal lake resting far ahead, and a solitary pine tree standing near the shoreline.
[alpine meadow terrain][0,0,0,0,0,0,[25,25,0.2],noise=0.2][crystal lake][0,4fd,0,0,0,0,[8,6,0.1]][solitary pine tree][0,-fd,0,0,0,0,3.0]
A rolling hillside terrain with a winding dirt path leading toward the front, and a wooden fence running alongside the right edge of the trail.
A flowering valley terrain with a giant cherry blossom tree in the center and a small picnic blanket spread directly beneath it.
[flowering valley terrain][0,0,0,0,0,0,[18,18,1],noise=0.3][giant cherry blossom tree][0,0,0,0,0,0,5.0][picnic blanket][0,0,-hh,0,0,0,[1.5,1.5,0.02]]
A coastal cliff terrain overlooking the sea with a lighthouse perched on the front-right edge and a seagull gliding high above it.
[coastal cliff terrain][0,0,0,0,0,0,[25,20,4],noise=0.7][lighthouse][fw,fd,0,0,0,0,4.0][seagull][0,0,4fh,0,0,0,0.3]
A snowy tundra terrain with a frozen pond near the center and a wooden cabin tucked slightly behind it.
[snowy tundra terrain][0,0,0,0,0,0,[20,20,0.3],noise=0.2][frozen pond][0,0,0,0,0,0,[5,4,0.05]][wooden cabin][hw,-hd,hh,0,0,0,2.0]
A lush rainforest terrain with a waterfall cascading from a rocky cliff far ahead and a pool resting directly underneath it.
A golden wheat field terrain with a rustic windmill standing far to the left and a dirt road stretching toward it.
A tropical beach terrain with a curved palm tree near the shoreline and a hammock suspended beside it.
A canyon terrain with a narrow rope bridge spanning between two stone pillars and a traveler standing at one end.
A lavender field terrain with a stone well in the center and a wooden bucket resting beside it.
[lavender field terrain][0,0,0,0,0,0,[18,18,0.1]][stone well][0,0,0,0,0,0,1.5][wooden bucket][fw,0,0,0,0,0,0.3]
A river valley terrain with a small arched bridge crossing the water and wildflowers growing along both sides.
A misty moor terrain with a lonely standing stone near the center and a raven perched on top.
A mountain lake terrain with a wooden dock extending out over the water and a canoe tied to its right side.
A sunflower field terrain with a scarecrow standing in the middle and a crow perched on its shoulder.
A rugged volcanic terrain with a glowing lava pool near the front and a blackened rock arch rising behind it.
A peaceful orchard terrain with rows of fruit trees and a wooden cart parked along the front edge.
A forest clearing terrain with a stone campfire ring at the center and four log seats arranged around it.
A dramatic fjord terrain with steep cliffs on both sides and a sailing boat drifting through the center channel.
A meadow terrain at sunset with a lone gazebo near the center and climbing vines wrapping around its posts.
A serene garden terrain with a koi pond in the middle, a stone lantern along the shore, and a curved footbridge arching across the water.
